project: AL BASIR TOUR - Premium Multilingual Tourism Website
design_archetype: ARCHETYPE 5: LUXURY (Premium, Depth, Mystery) blended with High-Contrast Swiss

rules.anti_patterns: DO NOT use Inter, Roboto, or Open Sans. Do not default to bold for all headings; use font-light or font-black to create tension.

surfaces.header: Crystal Glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 (light) or bg-[#050B14]/70 (dark) with 1px delicate inner stroke (border-white/20 or border-white/10). DO NOT use purely transparent header.
surfaces.cards_marketing: Minimalist borders (1px border-border/40), no heavy shadows. Flat solid backgrounds.
surfaces.cards_dashboard: Flat solid background, 1px subtle border, sharp or slight 4px radius (avoid overly rounded buttons).

visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle film grain on dark mode backgrounds to emulate high-end editorial magazines.
visual_enhancers.icons: Use @phosphor-icons/react (Duotone weight) for marketing pages to give a high-end feel. Use lucide-react for standard dashboard actions.

layouts.spacing: Generous. Use p-8, py-20, p-12, gap-12 to ensure content breathes.
layouts.marketing_grid: Bento 'Tetris' Grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12) with high asymmetry. Large hero images spanning multiple columns.
layouts.dashboard_grid: High density grid with sharp 1px borders, collapsible sidebar for the admin panel, modular widgets.

motion.general: Smooth, deliberate. Use Framer Motion for scroll reveals, staggered list entry, and page transitions.
motion.hero_slider: Auto-rotating Framer Motion slider with parallax image effects, text fading in smoothly from bottom.
motion.hover_states: Buttons lift slightly (-translate-y-1) and gain subtle drop-shadow. Images scale up smoothly (scale-105) within hidden overflow containers.
motion.interactions: Micro-animations on checkboxes, form inputs, and tab switches.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure gold text on white background meets 4.5:1 (might need darkening), or use gold strictly for thick accents/borders. Always check APCA contrast.
accessibility.reduced_motion: Respect prefers-reduced-motion using Framer Motion's useReducedMotion hook.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='booking-submit-button').

component_guidelines.header: Sticky nav, multilingual dropdown (UZ/EN/RU), Dark/Light toggle, Book Now CTA. Crystal glass surface.
component_guidelines.hero_slider: Full height (80vh min). Large display typography layered over darkened image overlays (bg-black/30). 8 auto-rotating destinations.
component_guidelines.tour_catalog: Cardless layout or 1px border. Image, price, discount badge (Sale). Strikethrough old price. 'View Itinerary' button.
component_guidelines.countries_page: Editorial list. Massive country imagery, typography overlapping images. Parallax scrolling.
component_guidelines.booking_form: Multi-step wizard (Shadcn forms), custom inputs, file upload dropzone for payment receipt.
component_guidelines.client_cabinet: Left sidebar (orders, messages, favorites). Top nav with user profile. Central grid for current bookings.
component_guidelines.admin_dashboard: Dense data table (Shadcn Table), charts for statistics (Recharts or Shadcn Charts). Quick actions for CRUD operations.
component_guidelines.chat_widget: Floating bottom-right button opening a clean, fast chat interface. Differentiate Admin vs Client messages with color blocks.

3d_libraries.recommendation: React Spring Parallax for 2.5D storytelling on the Countries showcase page. Do not over-use 3D; rely on high-quality 2D photography to sell the travel experience.

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. In frontend design, this creates what users call the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur). DO NOT USE FULLY TRANSPARENT BACKGROUNDS for headers, dropdowns, overlays.
You MUST NOT apply universal transition (e.g., transition: all). Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, i.e., do not add `.App { text-align: center; }` in the css file. Left-align for better readability.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style.
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Use sonner for toast notifications (located in /app/src/components/ui/sonner.js/tsx).
Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN. Use the curated image URLs provided.
Ensure the application strictly uses Javascript (.js) and not Typescript where possible based on system rules.
instructions_to_main_agent: Read this JSON thoroughly. The app must have both marketing side and two dashboard sides (client, admin).
Configure Tailwind with the specified colors and fonts (Playfair Display for headings, Manrope for body).
Ensure routing clearly separates Public routes (/, /tours, /countries) from App routes (/cabinet, /admin).
Implement internationalization (i18n) setup for UZ/EN/RU early in the structure.
Use standard Shadcn components for complex interactions (Tables, Dropdowns, DatePickers) but style them strictly to this luxury guideline (no standard Vercel styles).
All interactive elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.
Implement the ThemeProvider to support dark/light mode switching out of the box.
